findings.description: evmManager constructor parameter was unused (all static companion methods). Marked with @Suppress("UNUSED_PARAMETER").
Missing self-send prevention. Added check: if recipient == sender, return Invalid.
selectFeeTier had no bounds check. Added index validation.
Good use of EvmSendHelper interface to decouple from web3j, matching the established EvmBalanceFetcher pattern from WalletViewModel.
State machine transitions are well-guarded: confirmSend checks state == Confirming before proceeding, prepareSend validates inputs before transitioning to Building.
Good use of state hoisting pattern matching WalletScreen. All callbacks are default no-ops for preview compatibility.

verdict: All findings addressed in round 1 fixes. Code follows established patterns (MVVM, state hoisting, interface abstraction). State machine is clean and well-tested.
